prompt: Create a professional dark mode infographic optimized for LinkedIn (1080x1350px portrait format) titled 'The Rise of AI Adoption in Business 2020-2024'. Use a dark background (#0D1117 or deep navy #0A0E1A) with vibrant accent colors. Design a vertical bar chart or area chart showing AI adoption percentages by year: 2020: 15%, 2021: 28%, 2022: 41%, 2023: 67%, 2024: 89%. Style: modern, sleek, corporate dark theme with glowing neon-blue or purple gradient bars (#4F8EF7 to #A855F7), white and light-grey text for readability, subtle grid lines, and a gradient glow effect on the bars to emphasize growth. Include large bold percentage labels above each bar, year labels below each bar, and a clear headline at the top in white bold sans-serif font. Add a short subtitle such as 'AI adoption among businesses grew nearly 6x in just 4 years'. Include a visual trend arrow or annotation highlighting the steep growth from 2022 to 2024. Use clean minimalist layout with ample whitespace, a thin colored divider line under the title, and a small footer area. The overall mood should be data-driven, futuristic, and professional — suitable for a LinkedIn post that conveys rapid technological transformation.
